hero.description: Tirzepatide is a once weekly medical option that helps reduce hunger and cravings. At Nexus Clinic Kuala Lumpur, we keep it safe, structured, and doctor monitored.

understanding.title2: what it is, and why it feels different
understanding.subtitle: If you have tried "eat less, move more" a hundred times, you already know the truth. Some bodies fight back harder.
understanding.scienceDesc: Tirzepatide is designed for that exact problem. It works on appetite and fullness signals in the body, not just motivation. In large clinical trials, people with obesity lost significant body weight over time.

whoFor.suit1: You have obesity, or you are overweight with weight related health risks
whoFor.suit2: You have tried structured diet and exercise but keep rebounding
whoFor.suit3: Hunger and cravings feel like the main obstacle
whoFor.notSuitTitle: This may NOT suit you if:
whoFor.notSuitIntro: A doctor must screen you, but common "do not use" situations include:
whoFor.notSuit1: Personal or family history of medullary thyroid cancer, or MEN2
whoFor.cautionNote: These cautions are highlighted in tirzepatide prescribing information, including a boxed warning.

results.subtitle: Let's keep it honest. Results vary. Genetics, starting weight, dose tolerance, protein intake, sleep, and consistency all matter.
results.tl1Desc: Appetite drops first; scale may change slowly
results.tl2Desc: Momentum builds if you keep meals consistent
results.tl3Desc: Many notice visible body shape changes
results.tl4Desc: Progress continues, but plateaus can happen
results.regainNote: * If you stop treatment after losing weight, regain is common. SURMOUNT-4 study shows importance of continuity.

approach.title: The Nexus Clinic Kuala Lumpur approach
approach.subtitle: (what "doctor monitored" should look like)

sideEffects.boxedWarningDesc: Thyroid C-cell tumors observed in animal studies
sideEffects.npraWarningDesc: Aspiration risk during general anaesthesia or deep sedation
sideEffects.severeNote: If you develop severe persistent abdominal pain, seek medical care immediately.
sideEffects.tellDoctorDesc: Before any procedure involving anaesthesia or sedation, inform your doctor you are on GLP-1 class medication.
sideEffects.npraNote: Malaysia's NPRA specifically highlights this risk

cost.title: Cost of tirzepatide in Malaysia
cost.subtitle: What affects the price
cost.pricingNote: At Nexus Clinic Kuala Lumpur, we position pricing around total programme value, not just "per injection," because monitoring and safety protect the patient.
cost.comparisonTitle: Tirzepatide vs other weight loss options
cost.vsSemaDesc: Both reduce appetite. Tirzepatide targets two pathways (GIP + GLP-1). In head to head research, tirzepatide produced greater average weight loss.
cost.vsFatDesc: Fat freezing targets local fat pockets. Tirzepatide supports whole body weight loss. Many use contouring after weight loss, not instead of it.
cost.vsPillsDesc: Some stimulant options can reduce appetite, but they don't address the same hormonal appetite pathways. A doctor should guide choices based on risks and medical history.

faq.a1: Tirzepatide is used to improve blood sugar control in type 2 diabetes (Mounjaro). In the US, it's also approved for chronic weight management under the brand Zepbound.
faq.q2: Is tirzepatide the same as Mounjaro or Zepbound?
faq.a2: Mounjaro and Zepbound contain tirzepatide as the active ingredient. Tirzepatide is the medicine; Mounjaro and Zepbound are brand names.
faq.q3: How much weight can you lose on tirzepatide?
faq.a3: In a 72 week trial, average weight loss was 15% to about 21% in adults with obesity (without diabetes). Individual results vary.
faq.a4: Malaysia's NPRA has referenced Mounjaro in safety communications. It's available through prescription only at clinics with proper medical supervision.
faq.q5: Do I still need diet and exercise on tirzepatide?
faq.a5: Yes. Even the FDA indication specifies use with reduced calorie diet and increased physical activity. The injection supports appetite control, but habits keep results.

cta.title1: If you are tired of starting over every Monday,
cta.description: A doctor monitored tirzepatide programme can help you feel in control again, with a plan that is safe and realistic.
cta.footer: Discuss eligibility, expected outcomes, side effects, and a structured plan at Nexus Clinic Kuala Lumpur
